$comment: El Carot persists everything on-device via lib/storage.ts (AsyncStorage). On web AsyncStorage is backed by plain localStorage with no key prefix, so these keys map 1:1 to the localStorage keys the CodeYam seed adapter injects. Production starts empty — a fresh install has no daily card and no history.

tables.name: elcarot.dailyCard
tables.description: The card locked in for the current day. Absent until the user opens the daily screen for the first time that day.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Local calendar day the card belongs to, as YYYY-MM-DD. A stored date older than today means a fresh card is due.

fields.name: n
fields.description: Major-arcana index 0-21, keying into CAROT_CARDS in data/cards.ts.

fields.name: revealed
fields.description: Whether the user has already flipped the card face-up. Return visits the same day render the reveal directly when true.

tables.name: elcarot.history
tables.description: Past daily cards, newest first. A day is appended once its card is revealed. Empty array on a fresh install.

tables.name: elcarot.lang
tables.description: Persisted language preference for card text. Defaults to 'es' when absent.

tables.name: elcarot.todayOverride
tables.description: Test/scenario seam only — never written by the app. When present, the date helper treats this YYYY-MM-DD as today so scenarios can pin a specific day and stay reproducible across calendar dates.

fields.name: value
fields.description: A YYYY-MM-DD date to substitute for the real clock.
